title: Selling Courses from Pakistan Without Stripe: Which Option Actually Works for You — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Trying to sell courses from Pakistan without using Stripe? You're not alone. PayPal's restrictions and Stripe's country limitations can be a major roadblock. As a digital creator in Pakistan, you need a reliable payment solution that can handle transactions without relying on these platforms. That's why we'll explore the best options for selling digital products without PayPal, focusing on the needs of creators in restricted countries like Pakistan, Nigeria, Ghana, and more.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad and Payhip are popular platforms for selling digital products, but they come with their own set of limitations. Gumroad, for instance, charges a transaction fee of 3.5% + 30¢ per sale, and Payhip's fees range from 2.9% + 30¢ to 3.9% + 30¢, depending on the payment method. In contrast, the Full Stack Bundle offers a seamless payment experience with no transaction fees, giving you more control over your sales and revenue. With Core Shop Engine, you can create a custom store, automate delivery, and handle payments without relying on third-party services.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

Stripe's availability map lists 46 supported countries. The rest of the world — including Nigeria, Ghana, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Kenya, Ethiopia, Venezuela, Iran, Cameroon, and Tanzania — is simply excluded. There is no appeals process. There is no waitlist. There is no timeline for when Stripe might expand to these markets. Gumroad and Payhip operate within the same conventional financial system, which means they face similar restrictions on payouts to certain regions. When these platforms do support your country nominally, the payout delays, currency conversion fees, and arbitrary holds can make the actual revenue you receive significantly less than what your buyers paid. Crypto-native infrastructure bypasses these layers entirely.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

When it comes to payment speed, fees, and real costs, the Full Stack Bundle stands out from the competition. With Core Shop Engine, you can enable instant automated delivery, eliminating the need for manual intervention and ensuring your customers receive their digital products promptly. Additionally, our platform charges a one-time payment of $79.99 for the Full Stack Bundle, which includes everything you need to create a custom store, including the Admin Dashboard and Web3 Wallet Connect. This means you can enjoy a seamless payment experience without incurring ongoing fees or subscription costs.
Don't rely on PayPal or Stripe to sell digital products in restricted countries – use the Full Stack Bundle instead.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

The Full Stack Bundle offers unparalleled automation and delivery capabilities, making it the perfect solution for creators who want to streamline their sales process. With Core Shop Engine, you can automate delivery, handle payments, and manage orders with ease, all from a single dashboard. This means you can focus on creating high-quality digital products while our platform handles the logistics, ensuring a smooth and stress-free experience for both you and your customers.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice between Gumroad, Payhip, and the Full Stack Bundle depends on your specific needs and goals as a digital creator. If you're looking for a seamless payment experience, automation, and delivery capabilities, the Full Stack Bundle is the clear winner. With its one-time payment of $79.99, you can enjoy a complete store infrastructure, including the Admin Dashboard and Web3 Wallet Connect, without incurring ongoing fees or subscription costs.
